experience.title: Content & Growth Operator
bullets: Managed an RSS-based news pipeline with prompt design and source whitelists/blacklists, publishing 550-670 EN and 610-850 ZH pieces weekly.
Curated daily market updates and homepage topic priorities, refreshing 36-55 topics weekly with the data team to improve relevance and presentation.
Researched and interviewed trending Web3 projects, producing 1-2 original features per week.
Led News distribution BD partnerships across RSS channels and Telegram bots, evaluating audience fit and channel scale to secure measurable exposure.
Partnered with the SEO team on long-tail keyword strategy, headline optimization, and multilingual localization to improve Google visibility and user growth.

experience.title: Content Editor
bullets: Curated selected content for homepage highlights, independently publishing 8-10 featured pieces daily with headline rewrites and key takeaway extraction.
Planned and wrote original thematic and partnership content, with single pieces driving 30+ new subscribers on the official Substack.
Produced official ETHShanghai2024 campaign copy, including warm-up posts, speaker announcements, agenda highlights, and event recaps.
Operated multi-channel community distribution on X, Telegram, and WeChat, amplifying market narratives and original research content.
Maintained and optimized the official Substack channel structure and growth settings, scaling total subscribers to 8,000+.

experience.title: Content Operator
bullets: 微信公众号内容更新与分发，每周编辑排版并发布文章，分发至 17 个自有社群及头条、币乎、腾讯等外部渠道，单篇阅读量稳定 4000+，并保证公众号关注量每月增长。
输出系列化原创内容，策划并撰写 NFT 周报、下周前瞻、一图读懂等栏目，以及 Mask、CryptoPunks 等生态盘点内容。
首页内容策展，筛选优质文章进行二次编辑与摘要提炼，保持每日 15+ 篇首页更新频率。
维护专栏体系，审核新专栏入驻并维护已有专栏信息，根据更新频率与内容热度动态调整首页展示。
通过活动驱动增长，将热点内容转化为图文用于 Twitter 与 Telegram 推广，并通过领取 SBT 的活动实现电报群从 0 到 4000+ 粉丝增长。
